headline: CME Group Is Expanding Its Market Reach; What the New Futures Launch Could Mean for Investors
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 1.26%, CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) is among the 7 Best Crypto Exchange Stocks to Buy Following Bitcoin’s Recovery. On June 11, CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) announced plans to expand its benchmark equity index futures lineup with the introduction of four new E-mini contracts, subject to regulatory approval. Scheduled to launch on […]
